name: Pugna
description: Who needs a blade when you have oblivion? Pugna When cast on an enemy unit, Life Drain damages the enemy unit and self-heals. When casting on an allied unit, Life Drain succors the allied unit while damaging Pugna.

abilities.name: Oblivion Savant
abilities.description: Grants self outgoing spell damage amplification per Tower destroyed in the game. Spell Damage Amp per Tower Destroyed: 1.5%.

abilities.name: Nether Blast
abilities.description: An exploding pulse that deals damage to enemy units in the area. Cast Range: 600. Effect Radius: 400. Damage: 95/170/245/320 (295/370/445/520). Damage Factor: 0.65. Cooldown: 100/115/130/145.

abilities.name: Decrepify
abilities.description: Slows an enemy unit and reduces its magic resistance while rendering it ethereal. For affected allied units, Pugna grants them incoming heal amplification without slowing their movement speed. Cast Range: 550/600/650/700. Move Speed Slow: 45%/50%/55%/60%. Magic Resist Reduction: 20%/30%/40%/50%. Debuff Duration: 3.5 (5). Heal Amp: 10%/15%/20%/25%. Buff Duration: 3.5 (5). Cooldown: 16/13/10/7. Mana Cost: 80.

abilities.name: Nether Ward
abilities.description: Increases cast range. The self spell damage amplification and enemy reduction via the Nether Ward refraction is less effective to Pugna and all affected enemy heroes respectively. Cast Range: 150 (350). Hit Count: 4 (6). Duration: 21/24/27/30. Effect Radius: 1400. Base Damage: 50/70/90/110. Enemy Used Mana to Damage Factor: 1/1.2/1.4/1.6 (2.9/3.1/3.3/3.5). Mana Cost: 40.

abilities.name: Life Drain
abilities.description: When cast on an enemy unit, Life Drain damages the enemy unit and self-heals. When casting on an allied unit, Life Drain succors the allied unit while damaging Pugna. Applies a debuff that reduces the affected enemy hero's outgoing spell damage while channeling. Reduces cooldown. Cast Range: 700. Break Distance: 900. Max Channel Time: 10. Damage per Second: 150/250/350. Heal per Second: 150/250/350 (172.5/287.5/402.5). Current Health as Damage: 100%. Cooldown: 115/160/205.
